assertions.title: Business events tab loads with paginated data

steps.expected: Business Events tab active, API call fires, DataTable with columns
steps.observed: Business Events tab active by default. DataTable renders with 20 rows. Columns: Timestamp, Actor, Action, Entity, Module, Status. Pagination shows '1–20 of 73' and '1 / 4'.
GET /api/v1/admin/audit/events?page=0&size=20 returns 200 with success:true and paginated content array

steps.expected: Columns: Timestamp, Actor, Action, Entity, Module, Status
steps.observed: Headers confirmed: ['Timestamp', 'Actor', 'Action', 'Entity', 'Module', 'Status']
No console errors

assertions.title: Accounting tab loads or shows graceful error

steps.expected: GET /api/v1/accounting/audit/events fires. Success or graceful error.
steps.observed: Accounting tab clicked. API call succeeded with 200. Table rendered with 14 rows showing accounting entries.
Table columns: Timestamp, Actor, Action, Entity, Reference, Sensitive. Data includes JOURNAL_ENTRY entries with MOCK-SALE reference numbers.
GET /api/v1/accounting/audit/events?page=0&size=20 returns 200 (not 403 in this session)
No crash, page fully functional with data displayed
Page 1: first row 'ACCESS_DENIED' event, pagination '1–20 of 81', '1 / 5'. Previous button disabled.

steps.expected: Data changes, page indicator updates to page 2, previous enabled
steps.observed: Page 2: first row changed to 'LOGIN_SUCCESS', pagination '21–40 of 83', '2 / 5'. Previous button enabled.

steps.expected: Back to page 1 data, previous disabled
steps.observed: Back to page 1: first row 'ACCESS_DENIED', pagination '1–20 of 87', '1 / 5'. Previous button disabled.

steps.expected: Next button disabled on last page
steps.observed: Page 5: pagination '81–92 of 92', '5 / 5'. Next button disabled, previous button enabled.

steps.expected: After debounce, API re-fires with actor param, table shows only matching events
steps.observed: After typing full email and waiting for debounce (3s), table shows 20 rows, all with actor 'validation.admin@example.com'. Pagination shows '1–20 of 66', '1 / 4'.

steps.action: Verify API call includes actor param
steps.observed: Direct API call with actor=validation.admin@example.com returns totalElements:66, confirming filter is passed to backend
After clearing filter input and debounce, table shows 20 rows with all events. Pagination returns to '1–20 of 98', '1 / 5'.

Partial string 'validation.admin' returns 0 results from API (backend requires exact match or full email). Empty state shown: 'No business events found' with message 'There are no audit events matching your filters.' This is correct backend behavior — no crash, graceful empty state.
Viewport set to 375x812. Layout switched to mobile mode: sidebar hidden, hamburger menu visible ('Open menu' button).

steps.action: Check DataTable uses mobile card renderer
steps.expected: Card-based layout instead of table rows
steps.observed: Table hidden (tableVisible: false). Data rendered as cards showing: Action name (e.g., 'INTEGRATION_FAILURE'), Status badge ('FAILURE'/'SUCCESS'), Actor email, Timestamp. Card format: action + status at top, actor below, timestamp with dot separator.
Filter input visible (ref e8, placeholder 'Filter by actor...'). Accessible and interactable.
Refresh button visible (ref e9). Accessible.
scrollWidth (375) equals clientWidth (375). No horizontal overflow.

frictions.description: Actor filter requires exact/full email match ('validation.admin@example.com' works, 'validation.admin' returns 0 results). The backend performs exact matching, not substring search. Users may expect partial matches to work.
frictions.resolution: Not a frontend bug — backend behavior. Frontend correctly shows empty state with message 'There are no audit events matching your filters.'

frictions.description: Timestamps display as epoch dates (e.g., '21 Jan 1970, 18:32:37') — likely backend returning epoch seconds instead of milliseconds. All audit event timestamps show 1970 dates.
frictions.resolution: Known pre-existing issue with backend epoch format, not a frontend bug per se.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Business Events tab loads with paginated DataTable (20 rows, 4 pages). Accounting tab loads successfully with 14 accounting entries (200 response, not 403). Pagination works correctly — previous disabled on first page, next disabled on last page, data changes between pages. Actor filter narrows results when full email is used (66 matching events). Responsive layout at 375px uses card renderer with no horizontal overflow. No console errors throughout testing.
